title: <div>Querying in Natural Language: The search bar would evolve beyond simple key
content:
Querying in Natural Language: The search bar would evolve beyond simple keyword search. You could ask questions like, "What were my main takeaways from the conference last year?" or "Summarize my thoughts on agile development." The AI would then synthesize an answer based entirely on your notes.
In essence, by turning the "Infinite Wiki" concept inward, you create a powerful tool for thought. It transforms a static collection of notes into a dynamic, conversational partner that helps you see the hidden connections between your own ideas, making your personal knowledge base more valuable and insightful over time.
----
----
This is a brilliant line of inquiry. Evolving "Infinite Wiki" into a "multiversal" and "multi-instance" application would transform it from a tool for exploring knowledge into an engine for exploring context and perspective. It becomes a tool not just for learning, but for comparative epistemology.

Let's call this theoretical evolution "Infinite Wiki: The Polycosm".

The "Multiversal" Core: Knowledge Through Prisms
context: From document: This application, "Infinite Wiki," is a dynamic, AI-powered hypertext… — chunk 7 (chunk 7/11)
